question: What breads are sesame‑free?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Would you like to try one of these?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yeah, the wheat bread is sesame-free.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I don't see any breads on our current menu today. How about the Side Salad or Apple Slices instead?

history.speaker: judge
history.text:
